response.overview: The film follows the love story of a young couple whose relationship faces a series of emotional challenges, misunderstandings, and family conflicts. As they struggle to stay together, they must overcome obstacles created by circumstances and people around them. The story centers on themes of love, sacrifice, trust, and remembering loved ones despite separation—reflecting the meaning of the title, “Mone Rekho” (“Remember Me”).
response.title: Mone Rekho
